landing.hero_title: Cloud cost control, intelligence to save
landing.hero_subtitle: We optimize your AWS costs through advanced AI, complete visibility, and savings prioritization.
landing.problem_waste_desc: Unused resources generate unnecessary costs. Idle instances, orphan volumes, and expired reservations silently consume budget.
landing.problem_visibility_desc: Hard to identify where the biggest cloud costs are. Data scattered across Cost Explorer, CUR, and dozens of AWS accounts.
landing.problem_manual_desc: It takes too long to manually analyze and optimize each account and service. Recommendations become forgotten backlog.
landing.solution_ai_desc: Detects patterns, waste, and savings opportunities automatically with artificial intelligence.
landing.solution_analyze_desc: We identify waste, opportunities, and prioritize savings actions in your AWS Organization.
landing.solution_reduce_desc: Significant savings in your spending. Prioritized recommendations with estimated savings.
landing.how_step1_desc: Integrate your AWS Organization in minutes via CloudFormation. Read-only permissions and a unique External ID per tenant.
landing.how_step2_desc: A daily batch cross-references 7 AWS connectors to prioritize the actions with the highest impact on your bill.
landing.trial_desc: Full platform access while you validate the ROI.
landing.trial_feature1: AWS Organizations, CUR, Cost Explorer ingestion
landing.trial_feature2: Recommendations from Cost Optimization Hub, Compute Optimizer, Trusted Advisor
landing.trial_feature4: User invitations, owner and read groups
landing.pro_desc: At the end of the month, we sum the identified savings in your resources and charge 10%. You only pay when you save.
landing.pro_feature1: Everything from Trial, with no time limit
landing.pro_feature3: Action workflows with owner, priority, and audit
landing.pro_feature4: Exceptions with justification, approval, and expiration
landing.pro_feature5: Billing based on 10% of realized savings
landing.enterprise_text: Need specific conditions for large accounts?
landing.final_cta_title: Start now — 90-day trial, no credit card
landing.final_cta_desc: Integrate your AWS Organization and see measurable savings in the first week.

auth.login_desc: Use your Google account to sign in.
auth.signup_desc: You start on the free Trial plan for 90 days. You can upgrade to the Pro plan at any time.
auth.new_tenant_desc: A tenant represents your organization in Nimbus Frugal. You start on the free Trial plan for 90 days, with upgrade to Pro available at any time.
auth.fill_tenant: Fill in the tenant name to continue.
auth.invite_expired: This invitation has expired. Request a new invitation from the tenant administrator.
auth.invite_used: This invitation has already been accepted.
auth.invite_login_prompt: To accept this invitation, please log in or create an account.
auth.invite_already_member_prompt: You've been invited. Accept or decline the invitation?
auth.invite_existing_user_prompt: You already have an account on the platform. Log in to accept the invitation.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Consolidated view of your AWS Organization, recommendations, and connector freshness.
dashboard.onboarding_title: Complete onboarding to start collecting data
dashboard.onboarding_desc: Register your AWS Organization and connect the management account.
dashboard.freshness_desc: Data is updated in batch every 24h. Nimbus Frugal is not real-time.
dashboard.freshness_empty: No connector has collected data yet.

integrations.title: AWS Integrations
integrations.description: Manage your AWS Organizations and connectors. Each connector uses a separate IAM Role with least-privilege permissions.
integrations.add_org_desc: Enter the organization data and management account.
integrations.remove_org_confirm: and all its connectors. Type the organization name to confirm.

organization.title: AWS Organizations
organization.description: Account structure discovered via AWS Organizations. Updated every daily batch.
organization.tree_pending: Structure not yet discovered. Run the health check for the AWS Organizations connector in the

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.description: Prioritized opportunities from Cost Optimization Hub, Compute Optimizer, and Trusted Advisor.
recommendations.empty_desc: Recommendations appear after the first daily batch. Complete onboarding and wait for the next collection window.

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage tenant members and invitations. Default groups: owner and read.
users.invite_desc: The invitation expires in 7 days. Owners have full access; Read is view-only.
users.remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove
users.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the invite for
users.delete_confirm_suffix: ? If the user has already registered, they will be removed from the tenant.

settings.title: Settings
settings.demo_desc: Populate AWS Integrations, Organization and Recommendations pages with simulated data. Mutations are disabled while enabled.
settings.welcome_title: Welcome! Want to explore with demo data?
settings.welcome_desc: Demo mode fills AWS Integrations, Organization and Recommendations with simulated data so you can explore Nimbus Frugal without connecting a real AWS account. Mutations are disabled while on, and you can toggle it off anytime here.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.description: Manage the tenants you belong to.
tenants.delete_warning: This action is irreversible. All tenant data for
tenants.delete_warning_suffix: will be permanently deleted, including integrations, recommendations, and members.

upgrade.title: Upgrade to Pro
upgrade.description: Unlock advanced features and multiple tenants.
upgrade.trial_suffix: left in trial. When you upgrade, your plan changes immediately to Pro.
upgrade.benefit1: Multiple tenants — create and switch between organizations
upgrade.benefit3: Action workflows with owner, priority, and audit
upgrade.benefit4: Exceptions with justification, approval, and expiration
upgrade.benefit5: No time limit — everything from Trial, permanently
upgrade.billing_desc1: At the end of each month, we sum the
upgrade.billing_desc2: from the resources identified with savings potential in your AWS account. We charge
upgrade.billing_desc3: You only pay when you save.
upgrade.consent: I have read and agree to the Pro plan billing model. I understand that I will be charged monthly at 10% of estimated savings identified in my AWS resources.

paywall.title: Restricted access
paywall.expired_message: Your trial has expired. Upgrade to PRO to continue using
paywall.pro_price: PRO: 0.5% of consolidated monthly AWS spend

admin.setup_desc: This form appears only once. It creates the first Global Administrator and permanently locks this path. Future administrators can only join by invitation.
admin.setup_warning: By continuing, your Google account will be registered as Global Administrator and setup will be permanently locked.
admin.setup_done_desc: The Global Administrator was created successfully. This path (/nimbus-setup) is now permanently locked.
admin.setup_done_next: Log in to the admin panel to continue platform setup.
admin.login_desc: Restricted area for Nimbus Frugal Global Administrators.
admin.login_not_initialized: Platform has not been initialized. Use
admin.overview_desc: Nimbus Frugal global platform panel. Manage tenants, integrations, batches, and admins.
admin.recent_tenants_desc: Last 5 tenants created on the platform.
admin.admins_desc: Only global administrators can invite other administrators. Every action is audited.
admin.batches_desc: Daily collection and consolidation runs per tenant.
admin.integrations_desc: Global view of AWS integrations per tenant.
admin.users_desc: All users registered on the platform.
admin.delete_user_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete
admin.delete_user_confirm_suffix: ? All user data will be permanently removed (memberships, sessions, account). Tenants where they are the owner will also be deleted.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.description: Global record of all actions performed on the platform.
audit.tenant_description: Record of actions performed in this tenant.
